Pack downloaded from Freesound
----------------------------------------

"Custom Cymbals Vintage Percussion Pack"

This Pack of sounds contains sounds by the following user:
 - CVLTIV8R ( https://freesound.org/people/CVLTIV8R/ )

You can find this pack online at: https://freesound.org/people/CVLTIV8R/packs/43343/


Licenses in this Pack (see below for individual sound licenses)
